description: CompositionGrey check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a zippered closure on the front, two side pockets, two cargo pockets and two back pocketsFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in cool water at 30 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanWear these checked shorts from s.oliver this season to look your best. Slip into them when you are on a road-trip, for a casual date, or when lounging with your buddies. Pair it with flip flops, sneakers or floaters for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 43"Height: 5'7"; Waist: 26"
